---
title: "Rāg Naṭ malhār"
subtitle: "*Dārādīm dārā dīm*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Manaraṅg &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Tintāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> dārādīm dārā dīm dāra dīm dāra tadāre dāni dāni  
> tānā nāder der tom tānānā tānā tomder tadāre  
> dāni tadāni tātādāni dāni dāni dāni

**Antarā**

> abro vādo maho khuraśedo phalak dar kāranda  
> tā to nāne vakaph arī o vagaphlat na khurī

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Tintāl is a 16-beat cycle divided as **4 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the sixteen columns correspond to beats 1–16, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 9, and **3** at beat 13. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | S | S | R | S | R | R | G | R | G | m | D | D | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **dā** | **rā** | **dī** | **m** | **dā** | **rā** | **dī** | **m** | **dā** | **rā** | **dī** | **m** | **dā** |
| m | G | - | S | S | R | S | R | R | G | R | G | m | D | D | P |
| **rā** | **-** | **-** | **dā** | **rā** | **dī** | **m** | **dā** | **rā** | **dī** | **m** | **dā** | **rā** | **dī** | **m** | **dā** |
| m | - | G | - | m | R | - | R | $\lb{\mathrm{G}\mathrm{m}}$ | P | m | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | - | R | S |
| **rā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **dā** | **-** | **re** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **dā** | **ni** |
| R | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | R | P | m | P | - | P | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{n}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{D}}\mathrm{n}}$ | m | P |
| **dā** | **ni** | **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **der** | **der** | **to** | **m** | **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **tā** | **nā** | **tom** | **der** |
| D | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | D | P | m | P | m | G | R | G | m | P | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{n}}$ | D | - | P |
| **ta** | **dā** | **re** | **dā** | **ni** | **ta** | **dā** | **ni** | **tā** | **tā** | **dā** | **ni** | **dā** | **ni** | **-** | **dā** |
| P | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **ni** | **dā** | **ni** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | P | P | - | m | n | D | $\lb{\mathrm{n}\mathrm{D}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ab** | **ro** | **-** | **vā** | **do** | **-** | **-** | **ma** | **ho** | **-** | **khur** | **śe** |
| N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | - | P | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{R}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | - |
| **-** | **-** | **do** | **-** | **-** | **pha** | **lak** | **dar** | **kā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| n | P | - | P | m | P | - | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | D | P | m | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{m}}$ | P |
| **-** | **nda** | **-** | **tā** | **to** | **nā** | **-** | **ne** | **-** | **-** | **va** | **kaph** | **a** | **rī** | **-** | **-** |
| m | - | G | - | m | R | - | G | R | P | - | m | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{P}}$ | m | - |
| **o** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **va** | **gaph** | **lat** | **-** | **na** | **khu** | **-** | **rī** | **-** |
| G | m | R | S | R | P | m | P | - | P | m | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{n}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{D}}\mathrm{n}}$ | m | P |
| **-** | **-** | **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **der** | **der** | **tom** | **-** | **tā** | **nā** | **nā** | **tā** | **nā** | **tom** | **der** |
| D | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | D | P | m | P | m | G | R | G | m | P | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{n}}$ | D | - | P |
| **ta** | **dā** | **re** | **dā** | **ni** | **ta** | **dā** | **ni** | **tā** | **tā** | **dā** | **ni** | **dā** | **ni** | **-** | **dā** |
| P | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **ni** | **dā** | **ni** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
